title: Phase6DirectoryChoiceContracts
description: Frozen Phase 6 directory discovery, provider choice, choice truth, consent, and consent-drift contract pack.

PharmacyDirectorySourceSnapshot.title: PharmacyDirectorySourceSnapshot
PharmacyDirectorySourceSnapshot.description: One persisted source observation from a directory adapter execution.

adapterMode.description: Discovery adapter mode used for this source snapshot.

queryContextHash.description: Stable hash of the lookup inputs.

rawResultCount.description: Raw result count from the source.

stalenessMinutes.description: Observed staleness in minutes at normalization time.

PharmacyDirectorySnapshot.title: PharmacyDirectorySnapshot
PharmacyDirectorySnapshot.description: Normalized directory snapshot for one pharmacy choice refresh.

directoryTupleHash.description: Hash of the normalized directory tuple.

PharmacyProviderCapabilitySnapshot.title: PharmacyProviderCapabilitySnapshot
PharmacyProviderCapabilitySnapshot.description: Provider capability snapshot used by discovery and dispatch planning.

supportedTransportModes.description: Transport modes supported by the provider in this snapshot.

PharmacyProvider.title: PharmacyProvider
PharmacyProvider.description: Normalized provider abstraction for patient and staff choice surfaces.

dispatchCapabilityState.description: Dispatch capability state for explanation posture.

timingBand.description: Current timing band derived from the guardrail.

PharmacyChoiceProof.title: PharmacyChoiceProof
PharmacyChoiceProof.description: Auditable visible frontier and recommended frontier proof.

fullVisibleProviderCount.description: Count of the full visible provider set.

frontierToleranceRatio.description: Recommended frontier tolerance relative to the best score.

visibleChoiceSetHash.description: Hash of the visible choice set.

PharmacyChoiceExplanation.title: PharmacyChoiceExplanation
PharmacyChoiceExplanation.description: Provider-specific explanation bundle tied to the current proof and disclosure policy.

rankOrdinal.description: Ordinal rank within the visible frontier.

PharmacyChoiceDisclosurePolicy.title: PharmacyChoiceDisclosurePolicy
PharmacyChoiceDisclosurePolicy.description: Policy describing what is visible, warned, or suppressed from the same proof.

PharmacyChoiceOverrideAcknowledgement.title: PharmacyChoiceOverrideAcknowledgement
PharmacyChoiceOverrideAcknowledgement.description: Recorded acknowledgement for warned or policy-overridden provider choice.

PharmacyChoiceSession.title: PharmacyChoiceSession
PharmacyChoiceSession.description: Durable choice session with the full visible provider set and current selection provenance.

patientOverrideRequired.description: Whether warned-choice acknowledgement is still required.

PharmacyChoiceTruthProjection.title: PharmacyChoiceTruthProjection
PharmacyChoiceTruthProjection.description: Audience-safe choice truth projection derived from the same proof, disclosure policy, and current selection provenance.

patientOverrideRequired.description: Whether warned-choice acknowledgement is still required.

PharmacyConsentRecord.title: PharmacyConsentRecord
PharmacyConsentRecord.description: Explicit consent record bound to provider, proof, explanation, and scope.

patientAwarenessOfGpVisibility.description: Whether GP visibility implications were disclosed.

PharmacyConsentCheckpoint.title: PharmacyConsentCheckpoint
PharmacyConsentCheckpoint.description: Single authority for whether dispatch and reassurance may proceed.

PharmacyConsentRevocationRecord.title: PharmacyConsentRevocationRecord
PharmacyConsentRevocationRecord.description: Revocation or drift record that invalidates prior calm use of consent.
